name: browser-extensions
description: Authoring and shipping browser extensions (WebExtensions) for Chrome, Firefox, and Firefox for Android. Skill `browser-extensions` covers manifest v3 migration, content scripts, permissions, store rejections, and the Firefox-for-Android caveats. Skill `amo-compliance-check` runs a preflight audit (manifest, permissions justification, minified-source rules, addon ID) before submission to addons.mozilla.org and ships a `scripts/amo-check.py` linter.
